TronLink Wallet

Trusted by over 10,000,000 users worldwide

  • A decentralized self-custody wallet that is secure, transparent, and stable
  • Fully supports the TRON network and deeply supports its staking mechanisms
  • TronLink Extension now supports EVM networks including Ethereum, BSC, and BTTC
  • Offers seamless access to DApps and smooth on-chain operations, catering to various Web3 use cases
Install Now

  • Android

    Google Play
    Android APK

    Security Verification

    Asia Line US Line

  • Scan to Install

100,000+

Tokens

5 Years

Proven Track Record

200+

Countries

10,000,000+

Global Users

Top-Notch & Full-Coverage

Wallet Security Protection

  • From environment to transaction data, we create a comprehensive security shield for your digital assets.

  • Multidimensional tests on the running environment are conducted to ensure system security and protect your assets.

  • Your private keys are dual-encrypted through the security technologies.

More Inclusive

Network Coverage

  • Deep support for the TRON network: we support TRX, TRC-10, TRC-20, and TRC-721 tokens as well as unique staking mechanisms for you to obtain or delegate resources.

  • Heterogeneous EVM networks supported: TronLink Extension now supports networks including Ethereum, BSC, and BTTC.

  • Multichain HD wallet structure: this allows you to manage assets on TRON, Ethereum, BSC, and BTTC networks with a single mnemonic.

More Secure

Asset Management

  • Decentralized wallet: data security ensured through local storage of private key and multi-layer algorithm encryption.

  • Hot and cold wallets: sign in your hot wallet and store in your cold wallet to achieve physical isolation and double protection.

  • Node stability and reliability: free switching among nodes and auto reconnection supported.

More Convenient

User Experience

  • Simple and user-friendly: we support creating/importing wallets with one click, HD wallets, importing Ledger wallets via bluetooth and creating muiltiple wallet accounts.

  • Multisignature feature: a new way of signing that enables multiple accounts to manage one set of assets in various use cases.

  • Web3 browser: you can access trending Web3 DApps in DeFi, social media, and gaming in a few clicks and easily add DApps to your favorites.

TronLink Wallet

Trusted by over 10,000,000 users worldwide

Install Now
  • A decentralized self-custody wallet that is secure, transparent, and stable
  • Fully supports the TRON network and deeply supports its staking mechanisms
  • TronLink Extension now supports EVM networks including Ethereum, BSC, and BTTC
  • Offers seamless access to DApps and smooth on-chain operations, catering to various Web3 use cases

100,000+

Tokens

5 Years

Proven Track Record

200+

Countries

10,000,000+

Global Users

Top-Notch & Full-Coverage

Wallet Security Protection

  • From environment to transaction data, we create a comprehensive security shield for your digital assets.

  • Multidimensional tests on the running environment are conducted to ensure system security and protect your assets.

  • Your private keys are dual-encrypted through the security technologies.

More Well-Rounded

Features of TRON

  • Full coverage of tokens: we support TRX, TRC-10, TRC-20 and TRC-721 tokens while serving global TRON users.

  • Unique on-chain mechanism: you can stake TRX to gain resources and voting rights, consume resources instead of gas fees and vote for SRs to win considerable TRX.

  • Available SDK and testnet: we serve developers who can help expand TRON's ecosystem through joint efforts.

More Secure

Asset Management

  • Decentralized wallet: data security ensured through local storage of private key and multi-layer algorithm encryption.

  • Hot and cold wallets: sign in your hot wallet and store in your cold wallet to achieve physical isolation and double protection.

  • Node stability and reliability: free switching among nodes and auto reconnection supported.

More Convenient

User Experience

  • Simple and user-friendly: we support creating/importing wallets with one click, HD wallets, importing Ledger wallets via bluetooth and creating muiltiple wallet accounts.

  • Multisignature feature: multiple accounts to manage one set of assets with various use cases and a new way of signing.

  • Switch and manage with ease: TronLink is available in the forms of mobile app and browser extension, catering to your needs in different use cases. Come and enjoy TRON DApps whenever and wherever you want!
